data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding credit rollover or expiration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that credits either rollover or expire. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the expiration of credits but lacks concrete evidence of how this is enforced or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the mechanism for credit rollover or expiration.
